name: XMoment
description: Turn a viral tweet or moment into a tradeable Clanker coin on Base ($XMT). Descriptor-only — a human signs every mint. Exposes an MCP (streamable-http, CORS-enabled) so autonomous agents can coin the moment and draft a reply that redirects to the coin.

skills.name: Coin a viral tweet ($XMT moment coin)
skills.description: Turn an X tweet into a tradeable Clanker coin on Base plus a reply that redirects to it (/m/x:id). Returns an UNSIGNED deploy descriptor (a human signs) and a publish-GATED reply draft (a human posts).

skills.name: Coin any live moment
skills.description: Turn a live moment (goal, drop, cast) into a Clanker v4 deploy descriptor. Descriptor-only; a human signs.

safety.note: No tool signs, deploys, moves funds, or posts. The calling agent's user signs the mint; the agent posts its own replies under its own account and ToS responsibility.
